task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the eight specified top-level section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Styles pane or Navigation pane shows the 8 top-level headers (PROTOCOL SYNOPSIS, 1. INTRODUCTION AND RATIONALE, etc.) formatted with the 'Heading 1' style.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to all numbered sub-section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Styles pane or Navigation pane shows numbered sub-section headers (e.g., 1.1, 2.1, 6.1) formatted with the 'Heading 2' style.

task_completion.description: Insert a Table of Contents at the beginning of the document before the title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block is visible at the very top of the first page of the document, preceding the main title.

task_completion.description: Insert a table with at least 3 columns and 6 data rows in sub-section 6.1 Schedule of Assessments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the heading '6.1 Schedule of Assessments', there is a visible table grid containing at least 3 columns and 6 rows of data.

task_completion.description: Add a specific footer to all pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin of the document pages displays a footer with the exact text 'CONFIDENTIAL - HRZ-NSCLC-301 - For Regulatory Use Only'.

task_completion.description: Save the final file as 'oncology_protocol_final.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor title bar shows 'oncology_protocol_final.docx' or a File Explorer window shows the file saved in the Desktop\WordTasks directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the ribbon menus (Home, References, Insert) in Microsoft Word or a similar word processor, rather than using a terminal script to modify the docx file.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents is a generated field, not manually typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents appears as a native word processor element (e.g., has a bounding box, update options, or dot leaders typical of an auto-generated TOC).

integrity.description: The schedule of assessments is a real table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inserted table in section 6.1 uses native table cells and gridlines, not text aligned with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The industry classification 'Pharmaceutical and Medicine Manufacturing' corresponds to NAICS 32541. The O*NET code 27-3042.00 corresponds to 'Technical Writers' (which includes medical writers). The source document is a real Phase III clinical trial protocol (HRZ-NSCLC-301) containing 2,303 words.
